{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/heads/master/assets/cubyz/blocks/textures/glow_crystal/white.png
|block_health=5
|tool=[[Pickaxe]]
}}

Glow Crystals are colored light blocks found in crystal caves.

== Obtaining ==
Crystal cave biomes will contain at least one type of glow crystal, but may contain more.

== Usage ==

Glow crystals will produce light matching their color. Lighter crystals will produce brighter light, darker crystals will produce less light.

== History ==
* [[0.0.0]] - Added to the game

[[Category:Colored Blocks]]
[[Category:Light Blocks]]
[[Category:Blocks]]
